response.justification: Bogdan is a strong senior individual contributor with over 15 years of breadth across web, mobile, embedded, and developer tooling, but this role is fundamentally a people-management position and the resume contains no evidence of managing direct reports, conducting performance reviews, running one-on-ones, or leading an engineering team. Staff-level IC titles and community workshop facilitation do not substitute for the 2+ years of people management and 3+ years of formal technical leadership the role explicitly requires. The developer tooling experience is real but scattered and shallow relative to the depth expected for an Engineering Productivity Manager owning build systems and testing infrastructure at platform scale.
strengths: Deep, multi-decade hands-on engineering experience across stacks (TypeScript, DLang, mobile, embedded, infra) demonstrating genuine technical breadth
Demonstrated interest in developer tooling: CI/CD setup at Altom, test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP/agentic tooling at re:cinq
Community knowledge-sharing through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects shows communication and technical mentorship instincts
concerns: Zero evidence of people management: no mention of direct reports, hiring, performance management, or team growth in any role
No formal technical leadership scope — Staff titles are present but responsibilities described are purely IC-level delivery with no roadmap ownership or cross-team alignment
Mobile platform depth is minimal (brief iOS/Apple TV stint at WatchUp) and not positioned as a core competency, despite it being a key focus area of the role
